<!--
  PR title must follow Conventional Commits, e.g. "feat(core): add retry backoff".
  It is validated by the PR Title workflow.
-->

## What & why

<!-- Describe the change and the motivation. Link any related issues (Closes #123). -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Breaking change
- [ ] Docs / chore

## Checklist

- [ ] `pnpm build && pnpm typecheck && pnpm test` pass locally
- [ ] `pnpm lint` passes
- [ ] Added a changeset (`pnpm changeset`) if this affects a published package
- [ ] Updated docs / README where relevant
